content.text:
*takes a breath*

I think... it costs me a lot of evenings. Like, I'll have plans to do something for myself and then she calls and I just... don't do the thing. And it's not that she's forcing me, she's not. I just can't seem to -- 

*pauses*

And I'm tired. I think I'm more tired than I've been letting myself notice.

But I also don't want to make her sound like a villain, because she's not. She's just... she needs a lot, and I've always been available for that, so she doesn't know any different. That's not her fault.
